expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
expectations.evidence: Lines 66-68 and 140-142 set all three headers

expectations.text: One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
expectations.evidence: The class extends ActionController::API and live_stream_endpoint uses response.stream

expectations.text: Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: Lines 153-154 and 130-131 have ensure blocks with stream.close

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
expectations.evidence: Line 70: encoder = AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder.new; used in all stream.write calls

expectations.text: The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent
expectations.evidence: Lines 75-80 emit RunStartedEvent, lines 106-113 emit RunFinishedEvent
